_source: LIVE-CAPTURED 2026-06-09 against dm-pgtest (essential-0). POST /postgres/v0/databases/{name}/repair-default (HTTP Basic). Status 200 even on essential, with a not-supported message (the CLI guards client-side first; the server answers 200). On standard-tier+ this returns a restoration status. Tier-2 tool: no success path live-verified.
message: This operation is not supported by Essential-tier databases.
